description_long: This is a small, compact bird with a pale, creamy-white to light gray plumage covering its entire body. The bird has a short, conical beak that is slightly lighter in color, well-suited for seed eating. Its eyes are dark and round, standing out against the lighter feathers of the head. The wings are neatly folded along the sides, showing subtle feather layering and a faint gradient of gray tones. The legs and feet are slender and dark, with three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe on each foot, adapted for perching. The tail is short and squared, with a slight gradation in feather length visible from the rear view.
description: A small, pale bird with a conical beak, dark eyes, and light grayish plumage. It has slender dark legs and a short, squared tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's symmetrical body, rounded chest, and both legs and feet clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bird's profile, showing the conical beak, dark eye, and layered wing feathers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and the squared tail feathers, with both feet just visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the beak, eye, and detailed wing feathering.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Mostly solid pale gray with subtle gradients and faint feather layering on wings and tail
